item.title: Hisar Metal Industries Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Market Pressure
item.description: Hisar Metal Industries Ltd has declined to a fresh 52-week low, closing near Rs 150.2, marking a significant price level for the micro-cap iron and steel products company. This drop comes amid broader sector underperformance and persistent downward momentum in the stock's trading patterns. Time: 6 minutes ago

item.title: Getalong Enterprise Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amid Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Shares of Getalong Enterprise Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Commercial Services & Supplies sector, have declined to an all-time low of Rs.5.1, marking a significant milestone in the stock’s extended period of underperformance relative to broader market indices and sector peers. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Deccan Health Care Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: Deccan Health Care Ltd has recorded a new all-time low, closing just 2.03% above its 52-week low of ₹12.05, reflecting sustained pressure on the stock amid a challenging market environment and persistent underperformance relative to benchmarks and peers. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Ola Electric Mobility Ltd Surges to Intraday High with 8.18% Gain
item.description: Ola Electric Mobility Ltd demonstrated robust intraday performance on 16 Mar 2026, surging to an intraday high of Rs 25.5, marking a significant 10.39% increase from its previous close. The stock outperformed its sector and broader market indices, reflecting heightened trading activity and volatility throughout the session. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Sundaram Clayton Ltd Hits Intraday High with 8.0% Surge on 16 Mar 2026
item.description: Sundaram Clayton Ltd recorded a robust intraday performance on 16 Mar 2026, surging to an intraday high of Rs 1,333.4, marking an 8.0% increase. This strong rebound follows three consecutive days of decline, signalling a notable shift in trading momentum within the Auto Components & Equipments sector. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Paisalo Digital Ltd Hits Intraday High with 11.81% Surge on 16 Mar 2026
item.description: Paisalo Digital Ltd witnessed a robust intraday rally on 16 Mar 2026, surging to an intraday high of Rs 37.11, marking a significant 19.4% increase from its previous close. The stock outperformed its sector and broader market indices, registering an 11.81% gain by the end of the trading session amid heightened volatility and positive trading momentum. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Trent Ltd. Hits Intraday High with Strong 3.02% Surge on 16 Mar 2026
item.description: Trent Ltd. demonstrated robust intraday performance on 16 Mar 2026, surging to an intraday high of Rs 3,611.8, marking a 3.48% increase from its previous close. This rally comes after three consecutive days of decline, signalling a notable reversal in the stock’s short-term trend amid a broadly recovering market. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Trident Lifeline Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.235.1 Amidst Mixed Financial Signals
item.description: Trident Lifeline Ltd, a player in the Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector, touched a new 52-week low of Rs.235.1 today, marking a significant price level after a prolonged period of decline. This fresh low comes amid broader market volatility and sector-specific headwinds, reflecting a challenging phase for the micro-cap company. Time: 15 minutes ago

item.title: Uniphos Enterprises Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 90.15
item.description: Uniphos Enterprises Ltd has declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.90.15, marking a significant downturn in its stock performance amid continued financial headwinds and market pressures. Time: 15 minutes ago

item.title: LGB Forge Ltd Stock Hits 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: LGB Forge Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Auto Components & Equipments sector, recorded a fresh 52-week low today at Rs.5.97, extending its recent losing streak. The stock has declined by 6.86% over the past four trading sessions and currently trades below all key moving averages, reflecting sustained downward momentum amid broader market fluctuations. Time: 16 minutes ago

item.title: Naperol Investments Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.520
item.description: Naperol Investments Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, has touched a fresh 52-week low of Rs.520 today, marking a significant decline amid persistent downward momentum. The stock has underperformed its sector and broader market indices, reflecting ongoing concerns about its financial health and valuation metrics. Time: 16 minutes ago

item.title: Palco Metals Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: Palco Metals Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Non - Ferrous Metals sector, touched a new 52-week low of Rs.88.85 today, marking a significant decline amid a volatile trading session. The stock’s performance continues to trail its sector and broader market indices, reflecting ongoing pressures within its price movement and valuation metrics. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Panasonic Carbon India Company Ltd. Stock Hits 52-Week Low at Rs.433
item.description: Panasonic Carbon India Company Ltd., a micro-cap player in the Electrodes & Refractories sector, recorded a new 52-week low of Rs.433 today. This marks a significant milestone as the stock continues to trade below all major moving averages, reflecting ongoing pressures in its market performance. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Vishvprabha Ventures Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.46.06
item.description: Vishvprabha Ventures Ltd, a player in the diversified commercial services sector, touched a new 52-week low of Rs.46.06 today, marking a significant decline amid persistent downward momentum. The stock’s performance continues to lag behind its sector and benchmark indices, reflecting ongoing concerns about its financial health and market positioning. Time: 18 minutes ago

item.title: Shree Ganesh Biotech India Ltd Hits All-Time Low Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: Shree Ganesh Biotech India Ltd’s stock has declined to an all-time low, closing just 3.51% above its 52-week low of Rs 0.55 on 16 Mar 2026. The micro-cap pharmaceutical and biotechnology company continues to face significant headwinds, reflected in its deteriorating financial metrics and sustained negative returns over multiple time horizons. Time: 18 minutes ago

item.title: Sterling Green Woods Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.18.88
item.description: Sterling Green Woods Ltd, a company in the Hotels & Resorts sector, has reached a new 52-week low of Rs.18.88 today, marking a significant decline amid a broader market environment where the Sensex gained 1.42%. The stock has underperformed its sector and broader indices, continuing a downward trend that has persisted over the past six trading sessions. Time: 18 minutes ago

item.title: Morgan Ventures Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.48.03
item.description: Morgan Ventures Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, touched a new 52-week low of Rs.48.03 today, marking a significant decline in its share price amid a challenging market environment and subdued financial performance. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: B A G Films & Media Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.4.3 Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: B A G Films & Media Ltd has touched a new 52-week low of Rs.4.3 today, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid a sustained downward trend. The stock has underperformed its sector and broader market indices, reflecting ongoing pressures within the media and entertainment industry segment. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Himalaya Food International Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.7.39
item.description: Himalaya Food International Ltd has reached a new 52-week low of Rs.7.39 today, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid continued underperformance relative to its sector and benchmark indices. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: GSS Infotech Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amid Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Shares of GSS Infotech Ltd have declined to an all-time low, reflecting a sustained period of underperformance relative to the broader market and sector benchmarks. The stock’s recent price movements underscore significant pressures within the company’s financial metrics and market valuation. Time: 20 minutes ago
